source: OPEC+ Declaration of Cooperation — decision of 3 May 2026 (required production effective June 2026)
note: Required CRUDE production (mb/d) for the OPEC+ voluntary-adjustment group. Iran, Libya and Venezuela are exempt from quotas. UAE withdrew from OPEC/OPEC+ effective 1 May 2026. Hand-maintained — update after each monthly OPEC+ meeting (opec.org press releases).
